case_title: CATALINA RODRIQUEZ VS. ABC AEROLINEAS, S.A. DE C.V.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RODRIQUEZ, CATALINA AS TO DEFENDANT ABC  AEROLINEAS, S.A. DE C.V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ATTACHMENTS, ORDER ON REQUEST TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION AND CHECK FOR $50.00 MADE PAYABLE TO THE SECRETARY OF STATE, PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW FOR SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A FOREIGN CORPORATION; DECLARATION (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIQUEZ, CATALINA SERVED NOV-20-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABC  AEROLINEAS, S.A. DE C.V.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF DUE TO MEDICAL CONCERNS TO JUN-11-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-CONTINUE ORDER-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD

ATTACHMENTS, ORDER ON REQUEST TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION AND CHECK FOR $50.00 MADE PAYABLE TO THE SECRETARY OF STATE, PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW FOR SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A FOREIGN CORPORATION; DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIQUEZ, CATALINA
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-09-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CATALINA RODRIQUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABC AEROLINEAS, S.A DE C.V. IS NOT PRESENT.DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT THROUGH SERVICE ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE CALIFRONIA WERE NOT LOCATED DURING HEARING. AFTER HEARING PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT THROUGH THE SECRETARY OF STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED ON 12-2-20 AND 1-4-21 WERE LOCATED. PLAINTIFF WAS CALLED AND NOTIFIED THAT THE PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE WERE ON FILE. ORIGINAL CONTINUANCE DATE IN SEPTEMBER WAS MOVED TO JULY 9, 2021. PLAINTIFF MAY MAY REQUEST AN APPEARANCE BY ZOOM BY GOING TO THE SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG WEBSITE AND DOWNLOADING THE APPROPRIATE FORMS AND FOLLOWING THE DIRECTIONS PROVIDED SUBMIT HER ZOOM REQUEST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CATALINA RODRIQUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABC AEROLINEAS, S.A.DE C.V IS NOT PRESENT. MATTER WAS PREVIOUSLY HEARD ON 6-11-21, BUT WAS CONTINUED ON ACCOUNT OF NOT BEING ABLE TO DETERMINE IF PROPER SERVICE WAS EFFECTED THROUGH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETERY OF STATE. AFTER HEARING PROPER SERVICE WAS LOCATED. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIQUEZ, CATALINA AS TO DEFENDANT ABC  AEROLINEAS, S.A. DE C.V.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIQUEZ, CATALINA
REMARK: RETURN MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER
REMARK: RETURN MAIL- NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO ABC AEROLINEAS-UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/ATTEMPTED UNKNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED NOV-20-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABC  AEROLINEAS, S.A. DE C.V.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIQUEZ, CATALINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABC  AEROLINEAS, S.A. DE C.V. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PLAINTIFF'S EX-PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A FOREIGN CORPORATION; DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIQUEZ, CATALINA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO JULY 9, 2021 AT 10:00 A.M. DEPARTMENT 506
